evidence: standards/enterprise/supply-chain-legal.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: Only the approved organization policy authority may accept vulnerability risk and define response values; every decision records exact dependency/version, scope, owner, approval, expiry, compensating controls, and remediation plan.
statement: Dependency vulnerability findings MUST be triaged, remediated, escalated, or time-bounded by the consuming organization's approved vulnerability policy; this standard MUST NOT invent response windows or risk acceptance.
